headlines.title: Kioxia And 2 Japanese Growth Stocks With Strong Earnings Outlook
Japan warns of possible action as yen slides beyond intervention level
Japanese Yen dips despite warnings as Fed hike bets, Iran tensions lift US Dollar
Japan stocks hit fresh record highs on AI-driven gains
Japan’s Nikkei Hits Record High as Yen Slides Toward Its 1986 Low
British Pound jumps against the Japanese Yen as UK PM Starmer steps down
Nikkei 225 Hits Record High as Weak Yen and Lower Oil Prices Boost Japan Stock Market

marketTone.ko: 오늘 일본 증시는 인공지능(AI) 관련 상승세와 엔화 약세, 유가 하락에 힘입어 닛케이 225 지수가 사상 최고치를 경신했습니다. 일부 성장주의 견조한 실적 전망이 이러한 랠리를 뒷받침하는 가운데, 엔화는 개입 수준을 넘어 1986년 저점 부근까지 하락세를 이어갔습니다. 일본 정부의 개입 경고에도 불구하고, 연준의 금리 인상 기대와 달러 강세가 엔화 약세를 심화시켰으며, 정부의 잠재적 시장 개입이 주요 변수로 남아있습니다.
marketTone.en: The Japanese stock market reached fresh record highs today, with the Nikkei 225 surging on AI-driven gains, a weak yen, and lower oil prices. This rally was underpinned by a strong earnings outlook for some growth stocks, even as the Japanese Yen continued its slide, dipping beyond intervention levels and approaching its 1986 low. Despite warnings from Japan of possible action, the yen's depreciation was exacerbated by Fed hike bets and a stronger US dollar, with potential government intervention remaining a key catalyst.
